title: Lily's Colorful Feelings
synopsis: Join Lily as she discovers different emotions through beautiful colors. From happy yellow sunshine to sad blue rain, this gentle story helps toddlers understand feelings through vibrant visuals.

pages.text: This is Lily. She has many feelings.

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes stands in the center surrounded by swirling abstract colors representing different emotions - yellow sunshine swirls, blue rain drops, red angry spirals, all dancing around her in a magical emotion-filled background
illustration.alt: Lily surrounded by colorful emotion swirls

pages.text: When Lily is happy, she sees bright yellow sunshine all around her.

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes laughing joyfully with arms raised, surrounded by brilliant yellow sunshine rays and warm golden swirls creating a happy, glowing background
illustration.alt: Happy Lily surrounded by yellow sunshine

pages.text: When Lily feels sad, gentle blue raindrops fall softly.

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes looking downward with a gentle frown, surrounded by soft blue raindrops and misty blue clouds creating a peaceful sad atmosphere
illustration.alt: Sad Lily with blue rain around her

pages.text: When Lily gets angry, red swirls spin and dance.

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes with furrowed brows and hands on hips, surrounded by vibrant red swirls and zigzag patterns creating an energetic angry emotion background
illustration.alt: Angry Lily with red swirls around her

pages.text: All feelings are okay. Lily's colors make her special.

illustration.description: Lily with long curly auburn hair, fair skin with light freckles, green eyes smiling peacefully with arms open wide, surrounded by a beautiful rainbow blend of yellow sunshine, blue raindrops, and red swirls harmoniously mixing together in a balanced emotional landscape
illustration.alt: Lily embracing all her colorful feelings

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color does Lily see when she's happy?
questions.explanation: When Lily is happy, she sees bright yellow sunshine all around her.

questions.question: What happens when Lily feels sad?
questions.explanation: When Lily feels sad, gentle blue raindrops fall softly around her.

questions.question: Are all of Lily's feelings okay?
questions.explanation: Yes! All feelings are okay. Lily's colors make her special.
